scr_itemdesc_oldtype_slash_scr_itemdesc_: * "Dark Candy" - Heals 60 HP&* Black and red star that&  tastes like marshmallows./%
* "Life Dew" - Revive Ally (Weak)&* Glowing dew...&* It refreshes your SOUL./%
scr_itemuse_slash_scr_itemuse_gml_82_0: * (You tried to read the manual^1, but it was so dense it made your head spin...)/%
scr_itemuse_slash_scr_itemuse_gml_426_0: * (You tried to call on the Cell Phone.)
scr_keyiteminfo_slash_scr_keyiteminfo_gm: It can be used to make calls.
Not too important, not too unimportant.
Though broken, it seethes with power.#A master smith could fix it.
It's the top part of a key.#A smith could fix all three parts.
The key to a mysterious cell.#Something feels strange about it.
It's the middle part of a key.#A smith could fix all three parts.
It's the bottom part of a key.#A smith could fix all three parts.
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_8_: * "Hot Chocolate" - Topped with home-made marshmallows in the shape of bunnies./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_11: * "Pencil" - Weapon 1 AT&* Mightier than a sword?&* Maybe equal at best./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_14: * "Bandage" - Heals 10 HP&* It has cartoon characters on it./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_17: * "Bouquet" - A bouquet of beautiful flowers in many colors./
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_18: * Perhaps it could be offered to someone./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_21: * "Ball of Junk" - A small ball of accumulated things in your pocket./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_25: * "Ball of Junk" - A small ball of accumulated things in your pocket./
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_26: * It smells like scratch'n'sniff marshmallow stickers./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_30: * "Halloween Pencil" - Weapon 1 AT&* Orange with black bats on it./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_33: * "Lucky Pencil" - Weapon 1 AT&* Covered in green clovers and rainbows./%
scr_litemdesc_slash_scr_litemdesc_gml_36: * "Egg" - Not too important^1, not too unimportant./%
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_9_: * You drank the hot chocolate^1.&* It tasted wonderful^1.&* Your throat tightened.../%
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_34: * You held out the flowers^1.&* A floral scent fills the air^1.&* Nothing happened./%
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_42: * You looked at the junk ball in admiration^1.&* Nothing happened./%
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_12: \E0* Hello?&* Dreemurr residence...&* Who might this be...?/
\E5* Sigh... do not make me come over there./
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_13: * (The phone is ringing^1, but you can't get it.)/
* (You're already on the phone^1, after all...)/%
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_15: ＊ クリス^1　どうしたの？/
\E3＊ え^1？　 …だめよ^1。&　 ママは　クルマで　むかえに&　 なんて　いきません。/
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_16: \E1＊ うちは　そんなに　とおく&　 ないでしょう^1？　まちの&　 いちばん　北よ。/
\E4＊ あるいて　かえって&　 いらっしゃい^1。こころの&　 つよいコに　なれるわよ。/
scr_litemuseb_slash_scr_litemuseb_gml_17: ＊ クリス^1　いま　テストの&　 さいてんを　しているの。/
\E0＊ はなしが　あるなら&　 おうちに　かえってから&　 きいてあげますからね。/
\E0＊ うちは　まちの&　 いちばん　北よ。/
